race.comment: SOUL OF SPAIN (4) comes out of a brutally run G1 Tancred Stakes at Rosehill over 2400m with a respectable closing sixth. Drops 4.5kg for this and shapes as a leading player fifth-up. NEWLOOK (13) exciting stayer who let down strongly with a commanding victory over 2600m in the G2 Chairman's Quality at this track. Ready for this test on the limit and comes from a strong staying stable. Sure to be thereabouts. PIGGYBACK (8) progressing well for her target race after she kept finding through the line with a gritty fifth over 2400m in the G1 Tancred Stakes. Brings the right figures to take a hand in the finish. MR MONACO (11) yet to win past 2400m and chasing his third-straight win today. Circled the field with a fighting head win in the G3 N E Manion Cup over 2400m on a rain affected track at Rosehill. Likely to go back from the draw and be ridden for luck. Each way. LITZDEEL (14) peaking at the right time and shapes as a leading prospect on the limit weight.
